task_completion.description: Calculate Maximum Loop Width and Loop Width Percentage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for mathematical operations in the code calculating the maximum discharge difference between rising and falling limbs at the same stage, and dividing that value by the peak flow (multiplied by 100).
